description: Sentry Software provides infrastructure and hardware monitoring products, including Monitoring Studio X and Hardware Sentry. These tools monitor servers, devices, and applications and integrate with platforms such as BMC, Prometheus, and OpenTelemetry.
summary: sentrysoftware.com publicly documents two tenant/self-hosted HTTP REST APIs with OpenAPI specs (PATROL REST API and Hardware Sentry REST API) plus a downloadable `hws` CLI; authentication details for these developer surfaces are not clearly exposed in the public docs scraped.

packages.runtimeHint: Debian package, Docker archive, or Windows installer from Sentry Software downloads
